skills.name: svg-diagram
skills.description: Draw SVG diagrams inside HTML pages — flowcharts, decision trees, layer diagrams, architecture flows, tier matrices. Use this skill whenever the user asks for a diagram, visual flow, architecture drawing, or any SVG-based visual inside an HTML document. Also use when building single-file HTML reference pages that need section diagrams. Triggers on phrases like "draw a diagram", "add a flow chart", "visualize the architecture", "decision tree", "show the layers", or when building HTML pages with embedded SVG visuals. Do NOT use for standalone image generation or React/canvas-based visualizations.
